TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Maurice Bernard Sendak nu Amuhuan ngangan a kamu, Mulisis¬∑bunade¬∑sangdake nu Sakizaya a kamu. kakiliman Mulisis¬∑bunade¬∑sangdake (Amuhuan a kamu: Maurice Bernard Sendak, 1928 mihcaan enem a bulad cacay a bataan tu demiadÔľć2012 mihcaan lima a bulad waluay a demiad), nilecuhen i Amuhan a New York City Brooklyn, namisulit tu nu wawaay a sulit atu sikulitay. u sakaydihan nisulitan i 1963 mihcaan sulitan ku sakatalawanay a aaduban nu niyadu' paadih, uyni nisulitan sumaden malaiga tu aadihan "sakatalawanay a aaduban nu niyadu' ". kina limaay makaala tu nu Amuhuanay a nipikulit tu satalawkaway nu kasenengan katikecang (Caldecott Medal). yu mahida u sayaway tu cinida makaala tu guojiantusheng tu nu kulitan a kawlah (Hans Christian Andersen Award) nu Amuhuanay a tademaw. nilacul nu sayaway a nikaudip masacacayay a maudip mabelec sangdake i 2012 mihcaan limaay a bulad walu a demiad tu sananal siimelangay cinida tu tangahay a imelang, caay pakademec tu adada', sisa mangalep ku imelang sa, patay sa tu i Amuhuan kangnadikecu tanbuli , waluay idaw ku tulu a mihcaan ku nikaudip nida. misasulitay
S.PHON: mauri ¶…ô b…ôrnard s…ôndak nu amuńßuan ŇčaŇčan a kamu, mur~…ĺisis*bunad…ô*saŇčdak…ô nu sakizaja a kamu. kakir~…ĺiman mur~…ĺisis*bunad…ô*saŇčdak…ô (amuńßuan a kamu: mauri ¶…ô b…ôrnard s…ôndak, **** mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj a bataan tu d…ômiad***** mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad war~…ĺuaj a d…ômiad), nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß…ôn i amuńßan a n…ôw jork ¶itj brookr~…ĺjn, namisur~…ĺit tu nu wawaaj a sur~…ĺit atu sikur~…ĺitaj. u sakajdińßan nisur~…ĺitan i **** mińß ¶aan sur~…ĺitan ku sakatar~…ĺawanaj a aaduban nu nijadu Ē~ ° paadińß, ujni nisur~…ĺitan sumad…ôn mar~…ĺaiga tu aadińßan "sakatar~…ĺawanaj a aaduban nu nijadu Ē~ ° ". kina r~…ĺimaaj makaar~…ĺa tu nu amuńßuanaj a nipikur~…ĺit tu satar~…ĺawkawaj nu kas…ôn…ôŇčan katik…ô ¶aŇč ( ¶ar~…ĺd…ô ¶ott m…ôdar~…ĺ). ju mańßida u sajawaj tu ¶inida makaar~…ĺa tu guojiantusńß…ôŇč tu nu kur~…ĺitan a kawr~…ĺańß (ńßans ¶ńßristian and…ôrs…ôn award) nu amuńßuanaj a tad…ômaw. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu sajawaj a nikaudip masa ¶a ¶ajaj a maudip mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ saŇčdak…ô i **** mińß ¶aan r~…ĺimaaj a bur~…ĺad war~…ĺu a d…ômiad tu sananar~…ĺ siim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj ¶inida tu taŇčańßaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, ¶aaj pakad…ôm…ô ¶ tu adada Ē~ °, sisa maŇčar~…ĺ…ôp ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa, pataj sa tu i amuńßuan kaŇčnadik…ô ¶u tanbur~…ĺi , war~…ĺuaj idaw ku tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan ku nikaudip nida. misasur~…ĺitaj
S.FORM: Maurice Bernard Sendak nu Amuhuan ngangan a kamu, Mulisis¬∑bunade¬∑sangdake nu Sakizaya a kamu. kakiliman Mulisis¬∑bunade¬∑sangdake (Amuhuan a kamu: Maurice Bernard Sendak, 1928 mihcaan enem a bulad cacay a bataan tu demiadÔľć2012 mihcaan lima a bulad waluay a demiad), nilecuhen i Amuhan a New York City Brooklyn, namisulit tu nu wawaay a sulit atu sikulitay. u sakaydihan nisulitan i 1963 mihcaan sulitan ku sakatalawanay a aaduban nu niyadu' paadih, uyni nisulitan sumaden malaiga tu aadihan "sakatalawanay a aaduban nu niyadu' ". kina limaay makaala tu nu Amuhuanay a nipikulit tu satalawkaway nu kasenengan katikecang (Caldecott Medal). yu mahida u sayaway tu cinida makaala tu guojiantusheng tu nu kulitan a kawlah (Hans Christian Andersen Award) nu Amuhuanay a tademaw. nilacul nu sayaway a nikaudip masacacayay a maudip mabelec sangdake i 2012 mihcaan limaay a bulad walu a demiad tu sananal siimelangay cinida tu tangahay a imelang, caay pakademec tu adada', sisa mangalep ku imelang sa, patay sa tu i Amuhuan kangnadikecu tanbuli , waluay idaw ku tulu a mihcaan ku nikaudip nida. misasulitay
S.PHON: mauri ¶…ô b…ôrnard s…ôndak nu amuńßuan ŇčaŇčan a kamu, mur~…ĺisis*bunad…ô*saŇčdak…ô nu sakizaja a kamu. kakir~…ĺiman mur~…ĺisis*bunad…ô*saŇčdak…ô (amuńßuan a kamu: mauri ¶…ô b…ôrnard s…ôndak, **** mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj a bataan tu d…ômiad***** mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad war~…ĺuaj a d…ômiad), nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß…ôn i amuńßan a n…ôw jork ¶itj brookr~…ĺjn, namisur~…ĺit tu nu wawaaj a sur~…ĺit atu sikur~…ĺitaj. u sakajdińßan nisur~…ĺitan i **** mińß ¶aan sur~…ĺitan ku sakatar~…ĺawanaj a aaduban nu nijadu Ē~ ° paadińß, ujni nisur~…ĺitan sumad…ôn mar~…ĺaiga tu aadińßan "sakatar~…ĺawanaj a aaduban nu nijadu Ē~ ° ". kina r~…ĺimaaj makaar~…ĺa tu nu amuńßuanaj a nipikur~…ĺit tu satar~…ĺawkawaj nu kas…ôn…ôŇčan katik…ô ¶aŇč ( ¶ar~…ĺd…ô ¶ott m…ôdar~…ĺ). ju mańßida u sajawaj tu ¶inida makaar~…ĺa tu guojiantusńß…ôŇč tu nu kur~…ĺitan a kawr~…ĺańß (ńßans ¶ńßristian and…ôrs…ôn award) nu amuńßuanaj a tad…ômaw. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu sajawaj a nikaudip masa ¶a ¶ajaj a maudip mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ saŇčdak…ô i **** mińß ¶aan r~…ĺimaaj a bur~…ĺad war~…ĺu a d…ômiad tu sananar~…ĺ siim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj ¶inida tu taŇčańßaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, ¶aaj pakad…ôm…ô ¶ tu adada Ē~ °, sisa maŇčar~…ĺ…ôp ku im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa, pataj sa tu i amuńßuan kaŇčnadik…ô ¶u tanbur~…ĺi , war~…ĺuaj idaw ku tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan ku nikaudip nida. misasur~…ĺitaj
